## Summary

Describe what this PR changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation)
- [ ] chore (maintenance)

## Validation

- [ ] Ran relevant script(s) locally
- [ ] Verified no unrelated behavior changed
- [ ] Updated docs/changelog as needed

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] Scope is focused and minimal
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
